text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: I did it! I seized first place!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Did you see how excited the crowd got as I cut
through my rivals with my explosive speed?!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
All the leg strength I've built up for today has
filled me with princess pride!
choice_data_list: Let's work hard for the next race, too!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: Hehe! ♪ I wouldn't have it any other way!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text: For this princess is strong! Noble! And resolute!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
Now on to the next race! With my supersonic
high-speed running...

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
A princess never lets her guard down! My diligent
efforts must be constant!

text_block_list.name: Kawakami Princess
text_block_list.text:
I'll build my leg strength and spirit to even
greater levels than before!
